---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new capability
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Summary
A clear, one-sentence description of the feature.

## Problem / Motivation
What problem does this feature solve? Who is affected?

> Example: As a user with many links, I want bulk export so that I can download my analytics data for offline analysis.

## Proposed Solution
Describe the solution you have in mind.

- Which endpoint(s) would be added or changed?
- What is the expected request/response shape?
- Are there any configuration options required?

## Alternatives Considered
List any alternative approaches you considered and why they were rejected.

## Impact Assessment
- [ ] New API endpoint
- [ ] Changes existing API (backward compatible)
- [ ] Breaking API change
- [ ] Configuration change
- [ ] Performance sensitive path
- [ ] Security sensitive

## Additional Context
Any mockups, references to similar implementations, or related issues.
